title: erigeron elegans
intro: Erigeron elegans, also known as the Daisy Fleabane or Fleabane Daisy, is a perennial herb native to western North America, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and feathery foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Erigeron elegans include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat skin conditions and wounds.
